Qwen3.6-27B.notes: CoT leaks into user_simulator output; ~150 tok/s on single GPU

gpt-oss-120b.notes: Reasoning model; outputs internal chain-of-thought in 'reasoning' field

Llama3.3-70B-FP8.reason: 67.68 GiB weights leave only 12.32 GB for KV cache; FP8 Marlin emulation gives ~40 tok/s; cooperative timeout does not fire during streaming; tasks hang indefinitely

known_biases: CommitGate empty-schema bug in first run (all results discarded); fixed 2026-06-15
Baseline used 480s timeout; RAVEL used 900s timeout (unfair comparison for Qwen3 round 1)
GPU contention: baseline ran at ~5 concurrent, first RAVEL run at ~38 concurrent
Qwen3 extended thinking leaks CoT into user_simulator messages (~63% of messages affected)
Retail baseline uses llm_agent_gt (GT hints); RAVEL uses llm_agent (no GT hints)
gpt-oss retail baseline initially contaminated (9/14 infra_error); rerun for clean data
Gemma4 tasks 39/109/111: litellm ~90s timeout fires → failover to real OpenAI API → authz error
Telecom domain: max_steps=25 is structurally insufficient; 100% MAX_STEPS termination
